title: Vedaraniyam Heat Wave
lead: Vedaraniyam is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.49. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Vedaraniyam is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high temperature is accompanied by a relatively high humidity of 78% and moderate wind speed of 25.8 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 11.2 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
